mapper.select: SELECT ll.id, ll.lab_name, ll.lab_type, ll.lab_create_year, ll.lab_area, ll.lab_addr, ll.lab_seat, ll.lab_major, l.name FROM lab_sub ll LEFT JOIN lab_info l ON ll.lab_id = l.id WHERE ll.is_deleted = 0 AND l.is_deleted = 0

WITH RECURSIVE DateSeries AS ( SELECT DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 6 DAY) AS date UNION ALL SELECT DATE_ADD(date, INTERVAL 1 DAY) FROM DateSeries WHERE date < CURDATE() ) SELECT COALESCE(COUNT(ld.create_time), 0) AS booking_count FROM DateSeries ds LEFT JOIN lab_booking ld ON ds.date = DATE(ld.create_time) WHERE ds.date >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 7 DAY) GROUP BY ds.date ORDER BY ds.date;
